title: Kazzmon's Silk Touch Spawners
description: A Balanced Way to get Spawners for your SMP!
body:
**Kazzmon's Silk Touch Spawners is a balanced and non-overpowered way to get Spawners in your Minecraft World!**

- Spawners can be mined with a Netherite Pickaxe enchanted with Silk Touch. Spawners has a chance of 20% to drop when mined.

- Enchanting the Silk Touch Netherite Pickaxe with Efficiency will increase the drop rate of Spawners by 3% per level, maxing out to level 5 with an additional 15% drop rate.

- Spawners drop as a regular block, erasing its data about what mob it spawns.

- Spawn Eggs drop from most hostile mobs, which is used on Spawners to set the mobs to spawn.
